mapper.insert: INSERT INTO hm_query.inventory_health_flat ( id, tenant, last_synced_at, sku, product_id, product_name, category_name, seller_id, seller_name, warehouse_name, warehouse_code, available_qty, reserved_qty, damaged_qty, inbound_qty, stock_status, low_stock_threshold, days_of_supply, avg_daily_sales, last_sale_at, last_restock_at, cost_price, locked_capital, days_without_sale, stm_state, variant_id, primary_fc, batch_number, expiry_date ) SELECT inv.id, inv.tenant, NOW(), inv.sku, inv.product_id, COALESCE(p.name, ''), COALESCE(c.name, ''), inv.supplier_id, COALESCE(s.business_name, ''), COALESCE(w.warehouse_name, inv.primary_fc), COALESCE(w.warehouse_code, ''), COALESCE(inv.available_quantity, 0), COALESCE(inv.reserved_quantity, 0), COALESCE(inv.damaged_quantity, 0), COALESCE(inv.inbound_quantity, 0), CASE WHEN COALESCE(inv.available_quantity, 0) = 0 THEN 'OUT_OF_STOCK' WHEN COALESCE(inv.available_quantity, 0) <= COALESCE(inv.low_stock_threshold, 5) THEN 'LOW_STOCK' ELSE 'IN_STOCK' END, COALESCE(inv.low_stock_threshold, 5), -- days_of_supply: available / avg daily sales CASE WHEN COALESCE( (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(oi.quantity), 0) / NULLIF(30, 0) FROM hm_order.order_items oi JOIN hm_order.orders o ON o.id = oi.order_id WHERE oi.sku = inv.sku AND o.created_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days'), 0) > 0 THEN COALESCE(inv.available_quantity, 0) / (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(oi.quantity), 0) / NULLIF(30, 0) FROM hm_order.order_items oi JOIN hm_order.orders o ON o.id = oi.order_id WHERE oi.sku = inv.sku AND o.created_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days') ELSE 999 END, -- avg_daily_sales COALESCE( (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(oi.quantity), 0) / NULLIF(30, 0) FROM hm_order.order_items oi JOIN hm_order.orders o ON o.id = oi.order_id WHERE oi.sku = inv.sku AND o.created_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days'), 0)::INT, inv.last_sale_at, inv.last_restock_at, inv.cost_price, COALESCE(inv.available_quantity, 0) * COALESCE(inv.cost_price, 0), CASE WHEN inv.last_sale_at IS NOT NULL THEN EXTRACT(DAY FROM NOW() - inv.last_sale_at)::INT ELSE 999 END, inv.state_id, inv.variant_id, inv.primary_fc, inv.batch_number, inv.expiry_date FROM hm_inventory.inventory_item inv LEFT JOIN hm_product.products p ON inv.product_id = p.id LEFT JOIN hm_product.categories c ON p.category_id = c.id LEFT JOIN hm_supplier.supplier s ON inv.supplier_id = s.id LEFT JOIN hm_warehouse.warehouses w ON w.warehouse_code = inv.primary_fc

INSERT INTO hm_query.stock_movement_flat ( id, tenant, movement_time, movement_type, sku, product_name, quantity, warehouse_name, warehouse_code, reason, reference_id, performed_by ) SELECT CONCAT(m.inventory_item_id, '-', m.movement_time), inv.tenant, m.movement_time, m.type, inv.sku, COALESCE(p.name, ''), m.quantity, COALESCE(w.warehouse_name, m.fulfillment_center_id), COALESCE(w.warehouse_code, ''), m.reason, m.reference_id, '' -- performed_by not in OLTP yet FROM hm_inventory.inventory_movements m JOIN hm_inventory.inventory_item inv ON m.inventory_item_id = inv.id LEFT JOIN hm_product.products p ON inv.product_id = p.id LEFT JOIN hm_warehouse.warehouses w ON w.warehouse_code = m.fulfillment_center_id WHERE m.movement_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days'
